title: Toys' War
overview: Teddy is a super smart stuffed toy living in a happy life with his human friends and other robot toys. However, the good time is threatened by a wicked doctor who wants to monopolize children's childhood by using his new invented high-tech VR toys. Teddy and his toy friends are in danger. He and his mecha toy friend Linus are forced to embark on a journey to saving the toy world.
